steps.title: Use the graph directly
steps.content: The $x$-axis is pressure in atmospheres, and the $y$-axis is temperature in kelvins. The question asks for the temperature when the pressure is $6$ atmospheres, so start at $x=6$ on the graph.

steps.title: Read the y-coordinate
steps.content: At $x=6$, the graphed point is at about $y=700$. That means the estimated temperature is $700$ kelvins.
